title: 法官拒绝五角大楼“瘫痪”人类的企图
originalTitle: Judge rejects Pentagon's attempt to 'cripple' Anthropic
summary: 一名联邦法官告诉政府，它无法立即执行对Anthropic工具的禁令。
originalSummary: A federal judge told the government it could not immediately enforce a ban on Anthropic’s tools.

title: 伊隆·马斯克的X广告抵制诉讼被美国法官驳回
originalTitle: Elon Musk's X advertising boycott lawsuit dismissed by US judge
summary: 美国地区法官简·博伊尔（ Jane Boyle ）表示，该公司未能证明其受到联邦竞争法的任何损害。
originalSummary: US District Judge Jane Boyle said the company had failed to show it had suffered any harm under federal competition laws.
